content: Energy-momentum map from tr-ARPES showing the main Dirac cone and a clear replica band induced by the 5 μm pump excitation.
keywords: Clear visualization of the main Dirac cone.
Clear visualization of a replica band shifted from the main cone.
Axes labeled with energy (eV) and momentum (Å⁻¹).
Data acquired at a time delay of ~1 ps after pump excitation.

content: Plot showing the intensity of the replica band as a function of pump polarization angle (θp), demonstrating a characteristic anisotropy.
keywords: Shows a clear periodic variation (e.g., sinusoidal) in intensity.
Matches the trend predicted by the Volkov state scattering model.
Experimental data points overlaid with theoretical fit curve.

content: The anisotropy in the replica band intensity confirms that the replication mechanism involves scattering with photon-dressed Volkov final states, not just the initial Floquet-Bloch state.
keywords: Explicitly states the involvement of Volkov final states.
Links the polarization dependence to the scattering mechanism.
Distinguishes this mechanism from simpler band replication.
